seo.title: Top 10 Places to Visit in Andorra la Vella
seo.description: Explore the vibrant capital city of Andorra, featuring medieval churches, scenic parks, and historic parliamentary buildings.
seo.intro: Andorra la Vella is the highest capital city in Europe, blending historic Romanesque architecture with lively modern shopping streets.

places.name: Casa de la Vall
places.description: A historical house and former headquarters of the General Council of Andorra.

places.description: An ancient church known for its unique pre-Romanesque architecture and circular bell tower.

places.name: La Noblesse du Temps
places.description: A fascinating bronze sculpture by Salvador Dalí, located in a prominent city square.
places.seo_phrase: La Noblesse du Temps — Salvador Dali sculpture

adventure.title: Andorran Peaks and Valleys
adventure.subtitle: A stunning road trip through the Pyrenees

seo.title: 10-Day Andorra Road Trip: Peaks & Valleys
seo.description: Embark on a 10-day adventure through Andorra's most spectacular natural landscapes, viewpoints, and hidden gems.
seo.intro: Drive through the breathtaking Pyrenees, stopping at glacial valleys, ancient ruins, and dramatic high-altitude passes.

places.name: Pont de la Margineda
places.description: Start the journey exploring the largest and best-preserved medieval bridge in Andorra.
places.seo_phrase: Pont de la Margineda medieval bridge

places.name: Coll de la Gallina
places.description: Drive up this legendary, steep mountain pass for sweeping views of the southern valleys.
places.seo_phrase: Coll de la Gallina mountain pass

places.description: Visit this isolated mountain sanctuary, accessible by a scenic winding road.
places.seo_phrase: Santuari de Canòlich mountain sanctuary

places.seo_phrase: Mirador del Roc del Quer suspended deck

places.name: Vall d'Incles
places.description: Drive into one of Andorra's most pristine and idyllic U-shaped glacial valleys.
places.seo_phrase: Vall d'Incles glacial valley
